content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Gg1-1.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]'' released in 1989.]]

A list of events in '''1989''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==January==
*[[January 1|1]] – ''[[Battle for Endor]]'', a solitaire board game of the battle around the Imperial bunker on Endor, based on the ''[[Assault on Hoth]]'' game system, is published by [[West End Games]].
*[[January 17|17]] – [[Kelly Marie Tran]] is born.
*?? – ''[[The Star Wars Rules Companion]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – [[Starfall (adventure)|''Starfall'']], an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – ''[[Starfighter Battle Book: X-wing vs TIE Interceptor]]'' published.

==February==
*[[February 3|3]] – [[Lionel Newman]] dies.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 1: A New Hope]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==March==
[[File:AnakinSkywalker-TPMpromo.jpg|thumb|right|180px|[[Jake Lloyd]] was born on [[March 5]], 1989.]]
*[[March 5|05]] – [[Jake Lloyd]] is born.
*?? – [[Otherspace (adventure)|''Otherspace'']], an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==April==
*[[April 3|03]] – [[James McArdle]] is born.

==May==
*?? – ''[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|Scavenger Hunt]]'', an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – The ''[[Starfighter Battle Book: X-wing vs TIE Interceptor]]'', a flipbook game, is published by [[West End Games]].

==June==
*[[June 3|3]] – [[Megumi Han]] is born.
*[[June 10|10]] – [[Tina Ivlev]] is born.

==July==
*[[July 5]] – [[Claude Woolman]] dies.
*[[July 26|26]] – [[Derek Ball]] dies.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 2: Yavin and Bespin]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==August==
*[[August 27|27]] – [[François Sternkiker]] is born.
*?? – [[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']], an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==September==
*[[September 6|06]] – [[Hannah John-Kamen]] is born.
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==October==
*?? – [[Imperial Sourcebook|''The Imperial Sourcebook'']], a sourcebook for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==November==
*[[November 9|09]] – [[Billy Howle]] is born.
*[[November 22|22]] – [[Alden Ehrenreich]] is born.
*?? – [[Timothy Zahn]] begins writing ''[[Heir to the Empire]]'', after a call from his agent on [[November 6]].
*?? – ''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]'', a supplement for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].
*?? – ''[[Crisis on Cloud City (adventure book)|Crisis on Cloud City]]'', an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==December==
*?? – ''[[Otherspace II: Invasion]]'', an adventure scenario for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', is published by [[West End Games]].

==Unknown month==
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 6|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 6]] published in Winter.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 7|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 7]] published in Spring.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 8|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 8]] published in Summer.
*?? – [[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 9|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 9]] published in Fall.

----
